prestazioni: 3UR-FE 5.7L V8 engine (381 hp stock) upgraded with a Magnuson TVS2300 Supercharger (12 psi boost, 650+ hp) paired with a custom AEM V2 water-methanol injection kit (50/50 mix) to mitigate detonation under high load

Full exhaust overhaul using a Borla Atak cat-back system (3.5" stainless steel mandrel-bent tubing) with a custom X-Force 300-cell catted downpipe and a secondary MagnaFlow 2.5" resonator delete for aggressive tone without drone

Suspension reinforcement via King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilovers (10-stage compression, 24-way rebound damping) with custom-valved front/rear TRD Pro-specific spring rates (800 lb/in front, 600 lb/in rear) and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (27mm front, 24mm rear)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Sequoia-specific, 3.5" fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a functional hood scoop (integrated with the Magnuson supercharger intercooler)
Vorsteiner V-FF107 22" forged wheels (9.5" front, 11.5" rear, +15mm offset) wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler 305/50R22 tires (load range E) with custom TRD Pro badging on the center caps

Seibon Carbon fiber front splitter (3-piece, adjustable angle) and a custom rear diffuser (integrated with dual 4" Borla exhaust tips) paired with a TRD Pro-specific LED light bar (rigid industries 50" E-Series) mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack (Prinsu Design)
